textList: 36 of final 45 units must be earned in residence.
*** Repeat courses that are in-progress (IP) may be temporarily
applied twice on a requirement/unit count and will be
corrected when the IP courses are assigned grades.
*** Your audit may not have an accurate GPA/unit count if you
have more than 16 units of repeat courses. Verify GPA/unit
count with your academic advisor in the school of your major.
Students must complete 50 percent or more of the total quarter units
earned at UCI before graduation through courses that are not designated
as online or mixed modality by the University Registrar.
The current Modality Percentages are found on the top section of DegreeWorks.
Detailed information can be found on the Unofficial Transcript page under Modality.
The University Registrar website has more information on the Modality Policy:
https://reg.uci.edu/addl/modality.html
Students should monitor their in-person and online modality
percentages with the consideration that the calculations
remain in flux until all coursework is completed.
A minimum GPA of at least 2.0 is required in the upper-division
ICS courses required by the major.
*** Check your catalogue for course prerequisites.
*** If you have satisfied a course prerequisite by AP
exam or with a non-UCI course, you must visit the ICS
Student Affairs Office to be cleared for enrollment.
11 upper-div electives are a combination of specialization
courses, project courses, and any other additional electives.
Need to specify a specialization
